scripts.install:all: corepack pnpm -C backend install && corepack pnpm -C frontend install
scripts.build: corepack pnpm -C backend build && corepack pnpm -C frontend build
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm -C backend typecheck && corepack pnpm -C frontend typecheck
scripts.test: corepack pnpm -C backend test && corepack pnpm -C frontend test
scripts.worker:once: corepack pnpm -C backend build && WORKER_RUN_ONCE=true node backend/apps/worker/dist/apps/worker/src/worker.js
